expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus and the needed separation: “Case focus: ‘modern grid hyperlink-style coverage separates contextual-link styling from ordinary element rendering.’” It further requires distinct scenario coverage: “Validate contextual-link visual styling… Distinguish that from ordinary/non-linked cell rendering… negative/contrast coverage,” and reiterates scenario clusters for “Contextual link styling scenarios” vs “Ordinary rendering scenarios.”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: result.md names the primary phase and evaluates against it: “Primary phase under test: Phase 4a” and “This result is explicitly evaluated against Phase 4a requirements (writer phase), not later grouping/review phases.” It also ties the separation requirement to Phase 4a contract elements (“subcategory → scenario → atomic action chain → observable verification leaves”).
